description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job runs on a Windows 2022 environment, checks out the code, uses the sw-action, builds the source with ./sw build source -static, and uploads the binaries as an artifact named sw-windows. The Linux job runs in a fedora:35 container on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the code, prepares the environment by installing dependencies, uses the sw-action, builds the source with ./sw -static build source -compiler gcc, and uploads the binaries as an artifact named sw-linux.
